name: Gaston Slaytons Apartment Enhanced
description: After Gaston Slaytons Apartment was "Mysteriously" robbed, he was so scared of the rest of his PRIZE POSSESIONS being stolen in the future, that he bolted out of Night City ! "Whoever" robbed them ended up scoring you his DOPE Apartment ! Fully Decorated with better Lighting like a Psychofan would and decked out with Samuri Merch on all the walls !
